description:
Cooking Cat-astrophe is a cozy yet fast-paced cooking game starring an adorable cat chef trying to survive the chaos of ever-changing kitchens. Prepare burgers, soups, and salads, assemble each order with precision, and keep your workspace spotless while juggling multiple tasks at once.

 As you progress, the kitchen layouts shift and reposition themselves, forcing you to adapt on the fly and rethink your strategy. Learn new recipes, sharpen your timing, and tackle increasingly challenging stages where speed, accuracy, and quick decision-making are the keys to success.

 Unlock skill upgrades to enhance your cat chef’s abilities and collect unique skins to customize your hero. With simple controls, a warm cartoony atmosphere, and a charming feline protagonist, Cooking Cat-astrophe delivers light, fun, and engaging culinary challenges for players of all skill levels.
